records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! We underestimated the Level 2 situation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! We underestimated the Level 2 situation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! We underestimated the Level 2 situation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s might escape and get past the awareness distortion filter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s might escape and get past the awareness distortion filter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s might escape and get past the awareness distortion filter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are too many of them! Spread out and kill them all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are too many of them! Spread out and kill them all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are too many of them! Spread out and kill them all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, the C.O.s in this area have escaped the filter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, the C.O.s in this area have escaped the filter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, the C.O.s in this area have escaped the filter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Track them down! Outside of the operation area is a civilian residential area!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Track them down! Outside of the operation area is a civilian residential area!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Track them down! Outside of the operation area is a civilian residential area!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Minimize civilian casualties!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Minimize civilian casualties!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Minimize civilian casualties!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Alice of the Yaksha Division, the one in charge of this operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Alice of the Yaksha Division, the one in charge of this operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Alice of the Yaksha Division, the one in charge of this operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All units, maintain formation in your current location. I'll take care of the C.O.s that have escaped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All units, maintain formation in your current location. I'll take care of the C.O.s that have escaped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All units, maintain formation in your current location. I'll take care of the C.O.s that have escaped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Braidwood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Braidwood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Braidwood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you don't know where they're headed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you don't know where they're headed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you don't know where they're headed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. The C.O.s are going to gather at the abandoned factory in the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. The C.O.s are going to gather at the abandoned factory in the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. The C.O.s are going to gather at the abandoned factory in the outskirts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A demolition permit was issued here a few years ago. I should be able to fight without worrying here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A demolition permit was issued here a few years ago. I should be able to fight without worrying here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A demolition permit was issued here a few years ago. I should be able to fight without worrying here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But how...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But how...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But how...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was taught to work with what I have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was taught to work with what I have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was taught to work with what I have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I scattered the Eternium supply I had, so they'll smell that and gather here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I scattered the Eternium supply I had, so they'll smell that and gather here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I scattered the Eternium supply I had, so they'll smell that and gather here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, Looks like they're here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, Looks like they're here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, Looks like they're here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once everyone's done taking care of each area, come help me over here if you got time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once everyone's done taking care of each area, come help me over here if you got time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once everyone's done taking care of each area, come help me over here if you got time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let's do this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let's do this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let's do this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Congrats. I heard you managed to neutralize a CSE Level 2 situation all on your own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Congrats. I heard you managed to neutralize a CSE Level 2 situation all on your own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Congrats. I heard you managed to neutralize a CSE Level 2 situation all on your own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how you're quickly becoming a member of our division makes me proud.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how you're quickly becoming a member of our division makes me proud.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how you're quickly becoming a member of our division makes me proud.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess I can't call you stray cat from now on. Now then, what other nicknames will suit you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess I can't call you stray cat from now on. Now then, what other nicknames will suit you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess I can't call you stray cat from now on. Now then, what other nicknames will suit you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quit it with the nicknames! Just call me by my name!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quit it with the nicknames! Just call me by my name!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quit it with the nicknames! Just call me by my name!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Other than that, the next mission is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Other than that, the next mission is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Other than that, the next mission is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here it goes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here it goes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here it goes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Speciallll! Skilllll!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Speciallll! Skilllll!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Speciallll! Skilllll!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alice EXPLOOOOOSION!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alice EXPLOOOOOSION!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alice EXPLOOOOOSION!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hey...! I told you to delete that...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hey...! I told you to delete that...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hey...! I told you to delete that...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kekeke. Did you use your special skill to defeat them all this time too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kekeke. Did you use your special skill to defeat them all this time too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kekeke. Did you use your special skill to defeat them all this time too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Green pea! Gimme that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Green pea! Gimme that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Green pea! Gimme that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Not a chance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Not a chance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Not a chance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's saved! I made copies! It's not going anywhere forever!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's saved! I made copies! It's not going anywhere forever!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's saved! I made copies! It's not going anywhere forever!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uwaaagh...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uwaaagh...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uwaaagh...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: WAAAAAH...!! Deputy Commander...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: WAAAAAH...!! Deputy Commander...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: WAAAAAH...!! Deputy Commander...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hngh, the rookie hit me again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hngh, the rookie hit me again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hngh, the rookie hit me again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have another bump. My brain cells are dead. This is a loss for the Administration...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have another bump. My brain cells are dead. This is a loss for the Administration...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have another bump. My brain cells are dead. This is a loss for the Administration...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. You'll be better in no time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. You'll be better in no time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. You'll be better in no time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, no more crying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, no more crying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, no more crying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think you're coddling her too much? That's why her manners are terrible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think you're coddling her too much? That's why her manners are terrible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think you're coddling her too much? That's why her manners are terrible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Do you want me to coddle you too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Do you want me to coddle you too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Do you want me to coddle you too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! I don't need that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! I don't need that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! I don't need that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, I'm glad that everyone's getting along with each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, I'm glad that everyone's getting along with each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, I'm glad that everyone's getting along with each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It really feels like we're a family.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It really feels like we're a family.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It really feels like we're a family.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's time we can restart our search operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's time we can restart our search operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's time we can restart our search operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Search operation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Search operation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Search operation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason we could stay in the Normalside for this long is because the Administration was lenient with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason we could stay in the Normalside for this long is because the Administration was lenient with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason we could stay in the Normalside for this long is because the Administration was lenient with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha is a division that normally works on the forefront of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha is a division that normally works on the forefront of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha is a division that normally works on the forefront of the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Counterside...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counterside...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counterside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that where those C.O.s come from?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that where those C.O.s come from?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that where those C.O.s come from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha's mission is to search the Counterside one step ahead of the other divisions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha's mission is to search the Counterside one step ahead of the other divisions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha's mission is to search the Counterside one step ahead of the other divisions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration uses the intel we gather from our searches to determine the level of danger and devise an operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration uses the intel we gather from our searches to determine the level of danger and devise an operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration uses the intel we gather from our searches to determine the level of danger and devise an operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds pretty important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds pretty important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds pretty important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that also why the Yaksha Division is composed only of Bygone Counters?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that also why the Yaksha Division is composed only of Bygone Counters?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that also why the Yaksha Division is composed only of Bygone Counters?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. I knew you caught on fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. I knew you caught on fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. I knew you caught on fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most Bygone Counters are more resilient to Corruption, so they can dive longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most Bygone Counters are more resilient to Corruption, so they can dive longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most Bygone Counters are more resilient to Corruption, so they can dive longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, everyone here has animal-like senses which we use to quickly respond to danger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, everyone here has animal-like senses which we use to quickly respond to danger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, everyone here has animal-like senses which we use to quickly respond to danger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, our survivability rate in the Counterside is higher than that of normal Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, our survivability rate in the Counterside is higher than that of normal Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, our survivability rate in the Counterside is higher than that of normal Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even then... search operations aren't easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even then... search operations aren't easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even then... search operations aren't easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because nothing is guaranteed in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because nothing is guaranteed in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because nothing is guaranteed in the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm against it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm against it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm against it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kid? Why are you suddenly so serious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kid? Why are you suddenly so serious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kid? Why are you suddenly so serious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's a bad idea to let a clueless rookie dive into the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's a bad idea to let a clueless rookie dive into the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's a bad idea to let a clueless rookie dive into the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And above all, that thing always appears on first dives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And above all, that thing always appears on first dives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And above all, that thing always appears on first dives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ... A <color=#ffd34c>Shadow</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ... A <color=#ffd34c>Shadow</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ... A <color=#ffd34c>Shadow</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shadow? You mean the high-category C.O. that emerges from when a Counter gets Corrupted?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shadow? You mean the high-category C.O. that emerges from when a Counter gets Corrupted?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shadow? You mean the high-category C.O. that emerges from when a Counter gets Corrupted?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard they have intelligence and can even speak our language...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard they have intelligence and can even speak our language...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard they have intelligence and can even speak our language...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. It may sound like some urban legend...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. It may sound like some urban legend...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. It may sound like some urban legend...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But <color=#ffd34c>when a Counter dives into the Counterside for the first time, a Shadow will almost certainly appear.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: But <color=#ffd34c>when a Counter dives into the Counterside for the first time, a Shadow will almost certainly appear.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: But <color=#ffd34c>when a Counter dives into the Counterside for the first time, a Shadow will almost certainly appear.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most of them are <color=#ffd34c>Demon</color>-types.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most of them are <color=#ffd34c>Demon</color>-types.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most of them are <color=#ffd34c>Demon</color>-types.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But depending on the environment of the Counterside, they could also be <color=#ffd34c>Doppelganger</color>-types.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But depending on the environment of the Counterside, they could also be <color=#ffd34c>Doppelganger</color>-types.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But depending on the environment of the Counterside, they could also be <color=#ffd34c>Doppelganger</color>-types.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, it's better to think of them as at least a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, it's better to think of them as at least a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, it's better to think of them as at least a Category 3.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, you're recommending that I dive when I can handle a Category 3 C.O. on my own?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, you're recommending that I dive when I can handle a Category 3 C.O. on my own?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, you're recommending that I dive when I can handle a Category 3 C.O. on my own?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the Yaksha Division, a rookie's first dive is called a <color=#ffd34c>debut</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the Yaksha Division, a rookie's first dive is called a <color=#ffd34c>debut</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the Yaksha Division, a rookie's first dive is called a <color=#ffd34c>debut</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you'll have to defeat the Shadow attracted to you with your own hands in your debut.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you'll have to defeat the Shadow attracted to you with your own hands in your debut.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you'll have to defeat the Shadow attracted to you with your own hands in your debut.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We won't dive too deep for your first time, but you will still fight a Shadow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We won't dive too deep for your first time, but you will still fight a Shadow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We won't dive too deep for your first time, but you will still fight a Shadow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So let me know when you're ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So let me know when you're ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So let me know when you're ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,

records.m_Talk_ENG: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a firefighter. I'm always ready...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a firefighter. I'm always ready...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a firefighter. I'm always ready...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That tomboy defeated a Category 4 with one blow. So, there's no reason for me to be afraid of a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That tomboy defeated a Category 4 with one blow. So, there's no reason for me to be afraid of a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That tomboy defeated a Category 4 with one blow. So, there's no reason for me to be afraid of a Category 3.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? When do we start this operation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? When do we start this operation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? When do we start this operation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alice EXPLOOOOOSION!!!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Alice EXPLOOOOOSION!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-hey...! I told you to delete that...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-hey...! I told you to delete that...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-hey...! I told you to delete that...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kekeke. Did you use your special skill to defeat them all this time too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kekeke. Did you use your special skill to defeat them all this time too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kekeke. Did you use your special skill to defeat them all this time too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Green pea! Gimme that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Green pea! Gimme that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Green pea! Gimme that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Not a chance!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Not a chance!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Not a chance!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's saved! I made copies! It's not going anywhere forever!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's saved! I made copies! It's not going anywhere forever!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's saved! I made copies! It's not going anywhere forever!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uwaaagh...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uwaaagh...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uwaaagh...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: WAAAAAH...!! Deputy Commander...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: WAAAAAH...!! Deputy Commander...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: WAAAAAH...!! Deputy Commander...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hngh, the rookie hit me again...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hngh, the rookie hit me again...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hngh, the rookie hit me again...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have another bump. My brain cells are dead. This is a loss for the Administration...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have another bump. My brain cells are dead. This is a loss for the Administration...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have another bump. My brain cells are dead. This is a loss for the Administration...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. You'll be better in no time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. You'll be better in no time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. You'll be better in no time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, no more crying!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, no more crying!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, no more crying!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think you're coddling her too much? That's why her manners are terrible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think you're coddling her too much? That's why her manners are terrible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think you're coddling her too much? That's why her manners are terrible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Do you want me to coddle you too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Do you want me to coddle you too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Do you want me to coddle you too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! I don't need that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! I don't need that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! I don't need that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, I'm glad that everyone's getting along with each other.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, I'm glad that everyone's getting along with each other.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, I'm glad that everyone's getting along with each other.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It really feels like we're a family.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It really feels like we're a family.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It really feels like we're a family.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's time we can restart our search operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's time we can restart our search operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's time we can restart our search operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Search operation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Search operation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Search operation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only reason we could stay in the Normalside for this long is because the Administration was lenient with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only reason we could stay in the Normalside for this long is because the Administration was lenient with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only reason we could stay in the Normalside for this long is because the Administration was lenient with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha is a division that normally works on the forefront of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha is a division that normally works on the forefront of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha is a division that normally works on the forefront of the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Counterside...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that where those C.O.s come from?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that where those C.O.s come from?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that where those C.O.s come from?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha's mission is to search the Counterside one step ahead of the other divisions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha's mission is to search the Counterside one step ahead of the other divisions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha's mission is to search the Counterside one step ahead of the other divisions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration uses the intel we gather from our searches to determine the level of danger and devise an operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration uses the intel we gather from our searches to determine the level of danger and devise an operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration uses the intel we gather from our searches to determine the level of danger and devise an operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds pretty important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds pretty important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds pretty important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that also why the Yaksha Division is composed only of Bygone Counters?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that also why the Yaksha Division is composed only of Bygone Counters?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that also why the Yaksha Division is composed only of Bygone Counters?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. I knew you caught on fast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. I knew you caught on fast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. I knew you caught on fast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Most Bygone Counters are more resilient to Corruption, so they can dive longer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Most Bygone Counters are more resilient to Corruption, so they can dive longer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Most Bygone Counters are more resilient to Corruption, so they can dive longer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, everyone here has animal-like senses which we use to quickly respond to danger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, everyone here has animal-like senses which we use to quickly respond to danger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, everyone here has animal-like senses which we use to quickly respond to danger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, our survivability rate in the Counterside is higher than that of normal Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, our survivability rate in the Counterside is higher than that of normal Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, our survivability rate in the Counterside is higher than that of normal Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even then... search operations aren't easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even then... search operations aren't easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even then... search operations aren't easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because nothing is guaranteed in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because nothing is guaranteed in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because nothing is guaranteed in the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm against it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm against it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm against it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kid? Why are you suddenly so serious?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kid? Why are you suddenly so serious?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kid? Why are you suddenly so serious?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's a bad idea to let a clueless rookie dive into the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's a bad idea to let a clueless rookie dive into the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's a bad idea to let a clueless rookie dive into the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And above all, that thing always appears on first dives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And above all, that thing always appears on first dives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And above all, that thing always appears on first dives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ... A <color=#ffd34c>Shadow</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ... A <color=#ffd34c>Shadow</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ... A <color=#ffd34c>Shadow</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shadow? You mean the high-category C.O. that emerges from when a Counter gets Corrupted?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shadow? You mean the high-category C.O. that emerges from when a Counter gets Corrupted?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shadow? You mean the high-category C.O. that emerges from when a Counter gets Corrupted?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard they have intelligence and can even speak our language...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard they have intelligence and can even speak our language...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard they have intelligence and can even speak our language...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. It may sound like some urban legend...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. It may sound like some urban legend...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. It may sound like some urban legend...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But <color=#ffd34c>when a Counter dives into the Counterside for the first time, a Shadow will almost certainly appear.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: But <color=#ffd34c>when a Counter dives into the Counterside for the first time, a Shadow will almost certainly appear.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: But <color=#ffd34c>when a Counter dives into the Counterside for the first time, a Shadow will almost certainly appear.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Most of them are <color=#ffd34c>Demon</color>-types.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Most of them are <color=#ffd34c>Demon</color>-types.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Most of them are <color=#ffd34c>Demon</color>-types.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But depending on the environment of the Counterside, they could also be <color=#ffd34c>Doppelganger</color>-types.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But depending on the environment of the Counterside, they could also be <color=#ffd34c>Doppelganger</color>-types.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But depending on the environment of the Counterside, they could also be <color=#ffd34c>Doppelganger</color>-types.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, it's better to think of them as at least a Category 3.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, it's better to think of them as at least a Category 3.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, it's better to think of them as at least a Category 3.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, you're recommending that I dive when I can handle a Category 3 C.O. on my own?
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, you're recommending that I dive when I can handle a Category 3 C.O. on my own?
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, you're recommending that I dive when I can handle a Category 3 C.O. on my own?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the Yaksha Division, a rookie's first dive is called a <color=#ffd34c>debut</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the Yaksha Division, a rookie's first dive is called a <color=#ffd34c>debut</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the Yaksha Division, a rookie's first dive is called a <color=#ffd34c>debut</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you'll have to defeat the Shadow attracted to you with your own hands in your debut.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you'll have to defeat the Shadow attracted to you with your own hands in your debut.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you'll have to defeat the Shadow attracted to you with your own hands in your debut.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We won't dive too deep for your first time, but you will still fight a Shadow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We won't dive too deep for your first time, but you will still fight a Shadow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We won't dive too deep for your first time, but you will still fight a Shadow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So let me know when you're ready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So let me know when you're ready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So let me know when you're ready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if observing from afar is all you can do right now,

root.m_Talk_ENG: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: if you're thinking of staying in the Administration, take the image of her back to the heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is what you'll have to become and show to others one day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a firefighter. I'm always ready...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a firefighter. I'm always ready...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a firefighter. I'm always ready...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That tomboy defeated a Category 4 with one blow. So, there's no reason for me to be afraid of a Category 3.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That tomboy defeated a Category 4 with one blow. So, there's no reason for me to be afraid of a Category 3.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That tomboy defeated a Category 4 with one blow. So, there's no reason for me to be afraid of a Category 3.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? When do we start this operation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? When do we start this operation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? When do we start this operation?
